query:
-- Overview of users and their location data
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_users,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN role = 'user' THEN 1 END) as workers,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN role = 'employer' THEN 1 END) as employers,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "workerLocation" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as has_worker_location,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "preferredCity" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as has_preferred_city,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "workerSearchCity" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as has_worker_search_city,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "workerLatitude" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as has_lat
FROM users
WHERE status = 'active';
